nasb.text: David therefore inquired of God for the child; and David fasted and went and lay all night on the ground.

esv.text: David therefore sought God on behalf of the child. And David fasted and went in and lay all night on the ground.

cnv.text: 大衛為那孩子懇求　神，並且禁食。他進房裡去，終夜躺在地上。

ccb.text: 大卫为这孩子向上帝哀求，并且禁食，他进到里面，整夜躺在地上。
